title: Wildland Firefighters Congressional Gold Medal Act
short_title: Wildland Firefighters Congressional Gold Medal Act
stage_label: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs. (text: CR S231-232)
crs_summary: Wildland Firefighters Congressional Gold Medal Act This bill provides for the award of a Congressional Gold Medal to wildland firefighters in recognition of their strength, resiliency, sacrifice, and service to protect the forests, grasslands, and communities of the United States.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs. (text: CR S231-232)
